title: edwardsia unifoliata
intro: Edwardsia unifoliata, also known as the single-leaf Edwardsia, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Asclepiadaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Edwardsia unifoliata include relieving congestion, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats. Edwardsia unifoliata is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses.
